I will never be a financial victim in the season of new financial order of the Spirit. I'm in the kingdom and will never tolerate frustration.The flow of the big cash is certain and nothing, absolutely nothing can stop me from partaking in the huge and incredible harvests. Hallelujah. Please pray in othertongues.

affirmations.title: I WON'T LOSE MY SALVATION
affirmations.content: I affirm that I have salvation that is in Christ Jesus and will never lose it. This salvation that brought me eternal life, and brought me the indwelling presence of the Holy Spirit is my greatest treasure in this life. I affirm that no man, no devil can make me lose my salvation. Nothing created or uncreated will make me lose my salvation. I cut off every association, every union, trade and relationship however dear, that is a threat to my salvation. Yes, I'm coming out of it this minute. I affirm again and again that I won't lose my salvation. Hear this heaven and earth. Devil, your kingdom and all your human agents; I WILL NEVER LOSE MY SALVATION in Jesus Name. Amen Amen. Gloryyyyyyyyyy.

affirmations.title: I OVERCAME BY THE BLOOD
affirmations.content: I overcame by the blood and the words ofmy testimonies. I affirm that greatness runs in my bloodline. I will never be small nor live small. That blood my Jesus shed on the cross has brought me so much favours, so much power, so much riches, so much blessings, so much health and so much glory. Hallelujah. I'm holding on to this massive provisions and am not losing it. I declare that one drop of that blood is enough for me. It crushed and silenced principalities and powers. I believe in the efficacy and power of the blood. I declare that by his blood I have a perfect peace. Thank Jesus for yourblood Blessed be God forever more. Amen. Amen. Hallelujah. Let's Pray in the Spirit.

affirmations.title: ANOINTED
affirmations.content: I declare that I'm anointed. Thesame way God anointed Jesus Christ of Nazareth with the Holy Ghost and Power and he went about doing good, is the same way He has anointed me. Heeey, I'm anointed to do good and I just do good. My presence commands incredible vibes and irresistible steeze. This anointing has immuned me from failure, frustrations, infection, attack, disease and death. It has brought me into a blessed life, into a place of the highest honour and fearful favours. This is my consciousness and I'm loving it big time. Gloryyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy. Pray in the Spirit.

affirmations.title: CEASELESS CASHFLOW
affirmations.content: I affirm that whatsoever I do prospers. Yes my moves are minting money. Every step I take is multiplying money in my life. I am walking in ceaseless cashflow. You don't get. It doesn't stop. I'm a money magnate and is just natural with me to make money. I have become a money farm. Cashflow is my natural habitat and ministry. It's flowing even from the most unbelievable sources. Cash is raining in my life and accounts from the east, west, north and south of nations. There is no stopping it because I have destroyed delay, denials and disappointment. Blessed be God. Hallelujah.

affirmations.title: New Beginnings
affirmations.content: I am stepping into this month with unlimited potential. Every moment is a fresh start and I embrace the journey ahead with clarity and purpose.

affirmations.title: Abundance Flows
affirmations.content: Money flows to me effortlessly from multiple sources. I am grateful for prosperity and I attract wealth with ease.

affirmations.title: Inner Strength
affirmations.content: I am strong, resilient, and capable. My mind is sharp and my spirit is unbreakable. I face challenges with confidence.

affirmations.title: Love & Gratitude
affirmations.content: I am deeply grateful for every blessing. My heart overflows with appreciation and I attract more goodness daily.

affirmations.title: Success Mindset
affirmations.content: I am a magnet for success. Every action I take brings me closer to my goals. I believe in my abilities completely.

affirmations.title: Health & Vitality
affirmations.content: My body is healthy and vibrant. I nourish myself with intention and my energy grows stronger every day.

affirmations.title: Purpose Driven
affirmations.content: I live with clear purpose and passion. My mission to myself is unwavering and I pursue it with determination.

affirmations.title: Limitless Growth
affirmations.content: I am constantly evolving and growing. Every challenge makes me stronger and every day brings new opportunities.

affirmations.title: Divine Alignment
affirmations.content: I am aligned with my highest purpose. The universe conspires in my favor and guides me towards my desires.

affirmations.title: Confidence Rising
affirmations.content: I walk in confidence and self-assurance. My worth is undeniable and I radiate positive energy.

affirmations.title: Manifestation Power
affirmations.content: I am a powerful manifestor. My thoughts become reality and my words carry creative power.

affirmations.title: Peace Within
affirmations.content: I am at peace with who I am. My mind is calm and my heart is centered in tranquility.
